title: Brooklyn Mirage is Nothing But an Empty Lot Now
summary:
It appears the Brooklyn Mirage and its $30 million venue expansion are officially a thing of the past, razed to the ground before a single song could ever be shazamed from its dance floor. Brooklyn Magazine stopped by 140 Stewart Avenue to find the 32,000-square-foot venue completely gone. In its place, just an empty lot...

author: Scott Enman

title: The Coney Island Mermaid Parade is Officially Returning This Summer
summary:
The waters around the Coney Island Mermaid Parade’s immediate future appear to have stabilized in a hurry. Just a few weeks ago, Coney Island USA, the non-profit behind the annual neighborhood-wide event, launched a crowdfunding campaign to ensure it could return for its 44th installment this summer. And now, it seems to have not only...

author: Michael Gonik

title: Jaboukie Young-White is Taking it One Set at a Time
summary:
Dovetail joints get their name from their resemblance to a dove’s fanned, tapered feather tail. They are composed of chiclet teeth, or pins, cut into the end of a piece of wood, spaced between notched out gaps that interlock with an inverse joint to form a right angle. It’s a literal building block of carpentry...
